holdings.infoBox: LITP is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are PLS Group stock at 12.55%, Liontown at 12.24%, Albemarle at 9.44%, Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile at 9.42%, and Ganfeng Lithium Group at 9.13%.

overview.description: The Sprott Lithium Miners ETF (LITP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Sprott Lithium Miners index. The fund aims to support the worldwide clean energy transition by tracking an index of global companies in the lithium industry. Securities are selected based on revenue and weighted by market-cap. LITP was launched on Feb 1, 2023 and is issued by Sprott.
